description_long: This is a mid-rise office building with a modern, utilitarian design, featuring a flat roof with multiple HVAC units and rooftop structures. The facade is composed of alternating bands of light gray concrete and darker accent panels, with large, regularly spaced windows providing ample natural light to the interior. The building has six main floors above a ground level that includes several garage-style entrances, likely for parking or service access. The rooftop is detailed with various mechanical installations, including air conditioning units and ductwork, indicating a focus on functionality. Balconies or ledges run along the length of each floor, adding depth and visual interest to the otherwise rectilinear structure. The overall appearance is clean and contemporary, suitable for a business district or urban commercial area.
description: A modern, mid-rise office building with a flat roof, large windows, and multiple rooftop HVAC units. The facade features alternating gray panels and prominent balconies, giving it a functional and contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with garage-style entrances at the base, large windows, and rooftop structures.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting additional rooftop HVAC units and a more detailed look at the mechanical installations.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the building's depth, window arrangement, and the continuation of balconies along the facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear perspective of the rooftop layout and mechanical equipment.
attribute_window_pattern: Horizontally aligned, evenly spaced rectangular windows in continuous bands across each floor, with regular vertical columns separating window groups.
